steps.title: Follow the speaker's urging
steps.content: The speaker tells the son to go forth, says unknown reaches await his possession, and ends by saying life is calling him. The tone is encouraging and forward-looking.

steps.title: Reject darker readings
steps.content: A focuses on matching a parent's accomplishments, B shifts to the struggles of raising a child, and C makes the poem a warning. The purpose is to send the child toward life's possibilities. The answer is D.
